Kola hyemalis, also known as the winter kola, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub native to tropical Africa, traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Kola hyemalis include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve fatigue and weakness, and act as a natural remedy for fever and cough.
